description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Product Details Black two-fold leather walletHas two main compartmentsHas two card slots, one id card holder, one insert pocket and a slip pocket on the left fold Three card slots, one zippered insert pocket, one slip pocket and one sim card slot on the right foldnbsp; Fabric detailing across the front and embossed branding Warranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlightSize 12 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
